spec.name: The Lower Part Of The Grassy Field
spec.description: You are in a lower part of the grassy field, south of a small lake. The grass here has been trampled by the many animals coming here for water, leaving the ground covered in tracks of different types. To the west you see a break in the wall of trees surrounding the field, and to the north is a small lake.

north.description: The animal tracks lead off to the north, and around the lake there.

west.description: To the south-west you see a break in the tree line, leading back to the forest path.

extra_descs.description: The tall grass makes a nice hiding place for animals.
The trampled grass path leads to the lake north of here.
The trees form a close thicket, blocking any exit to the south and east.
